faq.question: What services does FishiFox offer?
faq.answer: FishiFox specializes in full-scale web development, custom mobile applications (iOS and Android), IT base audits/research, and digital marketing strategies.

faq.question: How long does a typical web development project take?
faq.answer: Project timelines vary depending on complexity. A standard corporate website might take 4-6 weeks, while a complex e-commerce platform could take 3-4 months. We provide a detailed timeline during the proposal phase.

faq.question: Do you provide ongoing support and maintenance?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We offer various maintenance packages to keep your website or application secure, updated, and performing optimally after launch.

faq.question: What technologies do you specialize in?
faq.answer: We work with modern, robust tech stacks including React, Node.js, PHP/Laravel, Flutter for mobile, and various robust database technologies to ensure scalable solutions.

faq.question: Can you help improve our search engine ranking?
faq.answer: Yes, our digital marketing and SEO services are designed to improve your online visibility. We optimize both the technical structure of your site and help with content strategies to drive organic traffic.
